name: SNM
title: HL7 v2 SNM Data Type
description: A string of telephone number digits consisting of an optional leading '+' character followed by one or more digit characters (0-9). No spaces, dashes, parentheses, or other formatting characters are permitted. The '+' prefix, when present, indicates an international dialing prefix.

element.definition: A string of telephone number digits consisting of an optional leading '+' character followed by one or more digit characters (0-9). No spaces, dashes, parentheses, or other formatting characters are permitted.
